Tooltip_KBW_AsphaltMixturePowder: Mix with water in a bucket to make asphalt for road construction.
Tooltip_KBW_PlanningVariant: Choose the variant saved into the planned ghost.
Tooltip_KBW_PlanningMaterial: Choose the material set saved into the planned ghost.
Tooltip_KBW_PlanningFinish: Plan the wall already plastered, painted or papered.
Tooltip_KBW_ListView: Show buildables as a detailed list.
Tooltip_KBW_ShowAllVersions: Show every construction version, including levels normally hidden by skill-based catalogue rules.
Tooltip_KBW_SearchMode: Choose whether search matches recipe names, required items, or both.
Tooltip_KBW_Sort: Choose the buildable sort order. Pinned recipes stay first.
Tooltip_KBW_PreviousLevel: Previous construction level or grouped buildable.
Tooltip_KBW_NextLevel: Next construction level or grouped buildable.
Tooltip_KBW_PlanningStage: Choose the grouped buildable level to place.
Tooltip_KBW_RenameBlueprint: Rename the selected blueprint using the name field.
Tooltip_KBW_NewBlueprint: Create a new blueprint at your current level.
Tooltip_KBW_ActivateBlueprint: Toggle this blueprint's ghost overlay in the world.
Tooltip_KBW_PinBlueprint: Pin this blueprint's total requirements to the HUD.
Tooltip_KBW_ManageAccess: Open blueprint sharing controls for default, faction and per-player permissions.
Tooltip_KBW_DrawRoom: Drag a rectangle to create a room zone.
Tooltip_KBW_ErasePlan: Erase planned buildables one at a time.
Tooltip_KBW_EraseRoom: Erase room zones without touching planned buildables.
Tooltip_KBW_BuildTool: Click planned buildables in the world to build them.
Tooltip_KBW_MoveBlueprint: Pick a new origin tile with the cursor; the whole blueprint follows.
Tooltip_KBW_GatherArea: Drag the container/vehicle area used for blueprint material counts and fetching.
Tooltip_KBW_BuildAll: Queue every planned buildable, fetching materials from the gather area when possible.
Tooltip_KBW_StopQueue: Stop the active blueprint build queue.
Tooltip_KBW_ExportBlueprint: Write the selected blueprint to Zomboid/Lua/KnoxBuildworks/exports. Export filenames use an ASCII-safe id; the full blueprint name is preserved inside the file.
Tooltip_KBW_ImportBlueprint: Import a Knox Buildworks .json file from Zomboid/Lua/KnoxBuildworks/exports. The list shows each blueprint's full saved name.
Tooltip_KBW_UpdateRoom: Apply the name field and the selected color to the selected room.
Tooltip_KBW_Vanilla_Dome_Kiln: A dome-shaped kiln for firing clay items at high temperatures.
